item.title: Additional blueprint YAMLs (6)
item.intent: Ship 6 additional blueprint YAMLs that validate against the schema and render correctly in blueprint list/preview. Every blueprint must be forgeable.
item.description: BLUEPRINT LIBRARY: 6 additional blueprint YAMLs — Family Hub, Founder's Ops, Replace Google Assistant, Replace ChatGPT Plus, Replace my PA, Research Co-pilot. Validate against current blueprint schema (CQ-009), adapt naming/paths, add missing fields (email-manager-adjacent skills, cron). Email Manager (CQ-017) is separate and higher priority — do not include it here. Acceptance: 'clawhq blueprint list' shows 7+ blueprints; 'clawhq blueprint preview <each>' renders valid design.
steps: Create Replace Google Assistant blueprint YAML
Create Replace ChatGPT Plus blueprint YAML
Create Replace my PA blueprint YAML
Validate all against blueprint schema from CQ-009
acceptanceCriteria: 'clawhq blueprint preview <name>' renders valid design for each
Every blueprint is forgeable via init wizard
